output.investigation_report:
# Triage Report: gpm_repeat_buyer_dim

## Error Details
- **Model**: gpm_repeat_buyer_dim
- **DAG**: transform_pricing__daily
- **Error**: Duplicate row detected during DML action (100090)

## Failure History
- New failure (first occurrence)
- Last success: 2026-03-11

## Cascade Analysis
- 2 downstream models affected: gpm_buyer_metrics, unique_gpm_repeat_buyer_dim_test

## Root Cause
Upstream backfill on participation_fact_enriched created 1,247 duplicate anon_id + experiment_id combinations, causing join fanout (436,168 affected rows).

## Resolution
- Type: escalate_to_owner
- Actions: Tag @tao.yang to dedup, rerun DAG after fix
- Owner: @albert.hu
